protocol.name: UMFR-36 frozen pre-2024 selection evaluation

control_side_rules.stale_1h: primary side stale by 12 completed bars
control_side_rules.stale_24h: primary side stale by 288 completed bars
control_side_rules.signal_delay_1bar: primary side delayed by one completed bar

protocol.entry: next Binance USD-M 5m open after completed signal bar
protocol.exit: scheduled USD-M open 36 completed 5m bars after entry
protocol.strict_mdd: held path, favorable first; funding debits before adverse; credits do not raise intratrade peak; exit-bar high/low excluded
protocol.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle cash

failures: train: mean gross underlying move not above 12 bp
select2023: mean gross underlying move not above 12 bp
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_path_excess
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_basis_stretch
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_spot_underresponse
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat venue_swap
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat stale_24h

selection.reason: UMFR-36 failed at least one frozen pre-2024 gate
